name: nansen
title: Nansen
description: Prediction market intelligence powered by Nansen's onchain analytics. Discover insiders, reveal wallet clusters, and investigate cross-market behavior on Polymarket.
author: luthfi

preferences.name: nansenApiKey
preferences.title: Nansen API Key
preferences.description: Your Nansen API key for authenticating CLI calls. Get one at https://app.nansen.ai/auth/agent-setup. Stored securely by Raycast's preferences system and only used in-memory as an environment variable.

commands.name: index
commands.title: Guide
commands.subtitle: Read me to use Nansen
commands.description: Prediction market intelligence powered by Nansen's onchain analytics. Discover insiders, reveal wallet clusters, and investigate cross-market behavior on Polymarket.

tools.name: search-markets
tools.title: Search Markets
tools.description: Search for Polymarket prediction markets by keyword. Returns market details including title, odds, volume, and market ID. Results are sorted by volume (most popular first).

tools.name: scan-insiders
tools.title: Scan Insiders
tools.description: Scan a Polymarket market for wallets with suspicious trading patterns. Returns scored wallets with flags like NEW_WALLET, EXTREME_ROI, SINGLE_MARKET. Use this after finding a market with search-markets.

tools.name: cluster-wallet
tools.title: Cluster Wallet
tools.description: Find related wallets for a given wallet address or Polymarket username using Nansen's clustering capabilities. Reveals funding chains, shared signers, and CEX deposit patterns.

tools.name: get-wallet-positions
tools.title: Get Wallet Positions
tools.description: Get a wallet's active and recent trading positions on Polymarket. Accepts a wallet address or Polymarket username. Shows markets traded, entry prices, current prices, and profit/loss.

tools.name: get-wallet-labels
tools.title: Get Wallet Labels
tools.description: Get Nansen labels and categories for a wallet address or Polymarket username. Shows if the wallet is a known entity.
